labels.name: v1-only
labels.description: Applies only to the stable v1 maintenance branch

labels.name: v2
labels.description: Applies to active v2 development on main

labels.name: backport
labels.description: Needs cherry-pick -x to another supported branch

labels.name: release-blocker
labels.description: Must be resolved before the next planned release

labels.name: breaking-change
labels.description: Introduces a major-version behavior or structure change

labels.name: good first issue
labels.description: Good entry point for new contributors

milestones.title: v1 maintenance
milestones.description: Bug fixes and support work for the stable v1 line on release/v1

milestones.title: v2 alpha
milestones.description: Incremental v2 development on main before feature freeze

milestones.title: v2 beta
milestones.description: Feature-complete v2 stabilization after cutting release/v2

milestones.title: v2 rc
milestones.description: Final release candidate hardening for v2.0.0
